title: eragrostis exigua
intro: Eragrostis exigua, also known as poverty grass, is a perennial grass species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis exigua include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
